company: Pro-Active Cyber Security - Protect Your Business | Cyber Dacians
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Dacians is a full-spectrum cybersecurity services provider, offering offensive (penetration testing, red teaming), defensive (vCISO, cloud security, hardening), and GRC/compliance (ISO 27001, NIST, PCI-DSS, GDPR) solutions, along with strategic consulting and staff augmentation.
